name: buyer submit happy path readback
scenario: rpc returns submitted proposal and proposals readback confirms it
risk_covered: final success from payload without authoritative truth

name: buyer submit duplicate tap
scenario: sendingRef is already locked and user taps submit again
risk_covered: duplicate tap publishing second terminal success
expected_result: guard_duplicate_submit failure and no rpc call

name: buyer submit stale readback
scenario: rpc payload says submitted but proposals readback returns draft/null submitted_at

name: buyer submit retryable failure
scenario: proposal submit rpc boundary throws 503 temporary outage

name: buyer submit partial local status degradation
scenario: server submit/readback succeeds but request_items status sync degrades
risk_covered: internal local step masking server transition failure
expected_result: partial_success warning; terminal submit already server-confirmed

name: director approve success readback
scenario: approve rpc succeeds and proposal readback has sent_to_accountant_at
risk_covered: success after rpc/general refresh without exact truth

name: director approve stale readback
scenario: approve rpc succeeds but proposal readback lacks sent_to_accountant_at
risk_covered: stale read model / speculative approve success

name: director approve denied
scenario: approve rpc returns ok=false permission failure
risk_covered: denied terminal failure hidden by fallback success
expected_result: DirectorApproveBoundaryError, no readback, no success marker

name: director approve retryable failure
risk_covered: retryable backend failure displayed as final success
